name: Kingdom Castle Wars
description: The king and princess of different kingdoms are fighting a great war together. Their primary goal in this great war is to destroy their huge castles. For this, they dig and extract precious metals under harsh conditions. And with the mines, they buy war cannons from the street vendor and target each others castles.
instructions: Computer Press S to earn money with the king Press T to earn money with the king Mobile Click on the mining blocks
tags: 2 Player, 2 Player Games, Action, Adventure, Arcade, Boy, Girl, Girls, King, Princess, War
